theses.title: AGQ correlates stronger with defect proxy than Sonar maintainability
Complementarity: Sonar A but low AGQ exists
theses.evidence: cases=6 (httpx, requests, urllib3, flask, click, aiohttp)

theses.title: AGQ median runtime is lower than SonarQube median runtime
AGQ discriminates quality across heterogeneous repos
